g.text: Follow the guildmaster on the tour.
Take on the chime train and water wheel.
Ask Master Pin for a better way.
Look at the two worst figures.
Reforge the fox's snapped leap spring.
Free the winter owl's seized head.
Quench the spring fast and test it tomor...
Temper it slowly overnight, the old way.
Face Master Pin with the pieces.
Find out who has the press.
Rig your own press from the bench vise.
Take Felix's trade and share the press.
Finish the summer without the owl.
Bring the old drawing to Pin.
Run the parade dry, a sure thing.
Hunt the lost drain gate with Felix.
Wind the clock yourself, as Pin offered.
Give Felix the key and take the hidden c...
Start below and free the water wheel.
Start above and rebuild the chime train.
Patch the paddles quickly with tin.
Carve proper oak paddles all summer.
Decide how the anchor gets made.
File an anchor alone, working nights.
Ask Pin to teach you, three slow weeks.
Take the winding post, Felix on bells.
Give Felix the winding and conduct the h...
Meet the rest of the roof.
Rebuild the trainer for the Glider Derby...
Join the pigeon post and race Admiral.
Test what the old wing knows.
Ask Sky about the tip stall.
Build the long soarer wing for the high ...
Build the short dart wing for the fast l...
Take the soarer up for a hop.
Fly the trials solo tomorrow, no crew.
Ask Juno and a friend to crew the launch...
Fetch her down from the awning.
See where the crew work leads.
Rig a quiet copy of Juno's hook.
Ask Juno straight out to share the relea...
Pull the dart from the straw.
Put the plan to the guild.
Rebuild the single rail, safe and proven...
Build the twin-rail catapult from the fl...
Fly the derby you trained for.
Fly the fast line under the chimneys.
Fly the high line over the weathervanes.
Train Pip for the market sprint.
Train Pip for the storm-bell return.
Fly the featherweight capsule in the tri...
Keep the regulation capsule and trust th...
Prove the protocol solo in the next squa...
Bring Juno in and design it together.
Watch the trials from the loft.
Let Pip lead the storm leg, Admiral flan...
Let Admiral lead, with Pip holding the l...
Launch early and chase the record crossi...
Bring them home to the bell.
Meet them at the loft door.
Wait at the loft rail for the sky to cle...
Ask him what the problem is.
Weigh the two builds at the bench.
Build the proofing-clock with weighted f...
Build the dumbwaiter lift for the narrow...
Perfect the two-oven clock and enter it ...
Scale to all eight ovens before the fair...
Fit it at the bakery first.
Untangle in front of the judges.
Offer Priya a trade for her brake design...
Improvise the rope-twist brake from the ...
Show Mr. Crumb the finished lift.
Bolt the cage in before dawn.
Let the week tell the story.
Meet the judges at the bakery.
Chase the rolls down the street.
Take the problem to the bench.
Learn the stall before you build.
Build the rumble-damper for the stall's ...
Build the apple-catcher rail and return ...
Ask the clerk about a permit.
Choose how to get your data.
Wait for the permit and lose the week.
Test on the street tonight, without the ...
Tune the damper to the chart.
Face the shop in the morning.
Keep one eye on stall nine.
Knock on Priya's bench and offer your he...
Polish your own entry; the row is a cont...
Take a perfect entry to the row.
Hear the row scored as a row.
Choose your place in the row.
Stand with Priya and co-run the scaler.
Run the apple-catcher at your own stall.
Move your stall to the head of the row.
Present the catcher to the judges.
